## Summary

Briefly describe the change.

## Maintainer Coordination

This repo is maintainer-directed. Unsolicited pull requests may be closed
without review. Link prior maintainer approval or explain why this change was
requested.

## Checks

- [ ] `forge fmt --check`
- [ ] `forge build`
- [ ] `forge test -vvv`

## Deployment Safety

- [ ] This does not change canonical deployment addresses.
- [ ] This does not modify historical deployment receipts except to correct
      documented metadata.
- [ ] This does not include private keys, mnemonics, RPC secrets, API keys, or
      wallet material.
